targets.rawSql: SELECT DISTINCT ON (strategy_name) strategy_name, started_at, (metrics::jsonb->'performance'->>'n_trades')::int AS n_trades, (metrics::jsonb->'performance'->>'total_pnl')::numeric AS pnl, (metrics::jsonb->'performance'->>'win_rate')::numeric AS win_rate, (metrics::jsonb->'risk_adjusted'->>'sharpe_per_trade')::numeric AS sharpe, (metrics::jsonb->'risk_adjusted'->>'mdd_usd')::numeric AS mdd FROM research.backtests WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY strategy_name, started_at DESC;

SELECT started_at AS time, (metrics::jsonb->'performance'->>'total_pnl')::numeric AS pnl, strategy_name AS metric FROM research.backtests WHERE status = 'completed' AND metrics IS NOT NULL ORDER BY started_at;

SELECT f.ts AS time, SUM((f.metadata::jsonb->>'pnl')::numeric) OVER (PARTITION BY o.strategy_id ORDER BY f.ts) AS cum_pnl, o.strategy_id AS metric FROM trading.fills f JOIN trading.orders o ON o.order_id = f.order_id WHERE f.mode = 'paper' AND f.metadata::jsonb->>'kind' = 'settle' AND f.ts > now() - interval '30 days' ORDER BY f.ts;

panels.title: Paper vs backtest comparisons (weekly, per ADR 0008)

targets.rawSql: SELECT strategy_name, week_start, week_end, paper_trades, backtest_trades, paper_pnl, backtest_pnl, delta_trades_pct, delta_pnl_pct, verdict FROM research.paper_vs_backtest_comparisons ORDER BY week_start DESC LIMIT 50;
